name: art.arteditor.gami-prefab-importer
description: Import ZIP packages exported from Brave Games web tools (Batch 9-Slice to Prefab Generator, PSD to Unity Prefabs, Nav Button Generator) into your Unity project as ready-to-use UI prefabs. Free edition - no account, no network calls, fully local. Visit https://arteditor.art to generate ZIPs.

samples.description: Example scene with imported Gami tile buttons demonstrating PLAY and EXIT button setup.
